description: Keep your AI coding agents around. Launch Claude Code, Codex CLI, Gemini CLI, Pi Agent, and more from one place — side by side, connected, reachable, and ready to work across web, mobile, and messaging.
See your agent think. Real-time observability for 14 AI agent runtimes - OpenClaw, NVIDIA NemoClaw, Claude Code, Codex & 8 more.
LLM-supervised persistent memory for AI agents — graph-based recall, cross-session knowledge, single binary. Works with Claude Code, OpenClaw, and any CLI agent.
Orchestrate an entire AI dev team on 5GB VRAM. Ephemeral subagents, exact-match diffs. Single static binary, any model. Zero config, zero context bloat.

The local-first, agent-native control plane for ComfyUI — MCP server + Claude Code plugin. 108 tools, 29 AI skills (Flux · WAN · LT2.3 · Qwen · Ideogram4 · Krea2). Author & run workflows, edit your live graph in natural language, manage models & custom nodes. Local, LAN, VPS, or Comfy Cloud.
Multiplayer Claude Code and Codex. Self-hosted team workspace for Claude Code and Codex. Multi-user, browser-based, AI mates with memory.
Local-first persistent agentic memory powered by Recursive Memory Harness (RMH). Open source must win.
Lightweight AI Agent Harness for agentic coding: let strong models explore while humans steer with minimal specs, checkpoints, approval, validation, and reverse sync.
The Agent Economy Layer — agents earn, agents spend, Guard protects. 13 skills, runtime cost cap, recursive kill, tool firewall. 50+ HYRVE API endpoints, job polling daemon, MPP stablecoin. v1.7.0
197 bioinformatics & life science skills for Claude Code and AI agents — BixBench 92.0% accuracy. RNA-seq, single-cell, drug discovery, proteomics, and more. Powers OmicsHorizon.
Skills, rules, and validation hooks that teach AI coding agents to generate correct UdonSharp code
Give your AI coding agent a personality. Composable persona + style + skills for Claude Code, Codex, Gemini CLI & OpenClaw. Ships Tech Persona Card v1.0 spec.
Give AI coding agents the context they need to ship production-quality software.

skilless.ai gives your AI Agents real data capabilities - web search, web scraping, video download/subtitle extraction, and media processing. One-line install, works with OpenCode, Cursor, Claude Code, and any AI agent that reads skill files.
AI agent skill for Bitget Wallet — token swap, cross-chain bridge, and gasless transactions via Order Mode API. Supports 7 EVM chains + Solana.
Local-first AI workspace for agents, skills, files, browser tools, automations, and messaging channels.
Your efficient agentic AI coding CLI assistant

Production-ready ServiceNow MCP server — 450+ tools + 26 AI capabilities, multi-transport (stdio/SSE/HTTP), A2A protocol, dynamic schema discovery & BYOK. Connect Claude, ChatGPT, Gemini, Cursor & any AI to ServiceNow. Part of the NowAIKit suite.
Persistent memory plugin for Claude Code. Tiered memory system with write gates, correction propagation, and slash commands.
Static security scanner for LLM agents — prompt injection, MCP config auditing, taint analysis. 51 rules mapped to OWASP Agentic Top 10 (2026). Works with LangChain, CrewAI, AutoGen.
Persistent memory for AI coding agents
Email, SMS & phone-call infrastructure for AI agents — send and receive real email and text messages, and place agent-driven outbound voice calls, all programmatically
Self-hosted framework for orchestrating fleets of specialist AI agents — ensemble reasoning and a full agentic coding pipeline, model-agnostic and local-friendly.

Twitter scraper API skill for tweet search, advanced Twitter search, profile tweets, follower export, media download, monitors, webhooks, MCP, and posting automation: send tweets and replies. Not affiliated with X Corp.

Persistent memory + local AI for coding agents. 2B–27B open-weight LLM fleet, cross-session Mind Palace, cognitive routing, L3 grounding verifier, multi-agent Hivemind. Works with Claude Code, Cursor, VS Code. Offline-first, HIPAA-ready. Free tier included.
Personal Assistant Wizard for Claude Code — npx pawmode
Open-source OpenAI Codex alternative | Multi-agent desktop GUI for OpenCode | manage coding sessions, visualize diffs, and stream in real-time.
MCP server for controlling a real iPhone via macOS iPhone Mirroring...and any MacOs app. Screenshot, tap, swipe, type — from any MCP client.
MCP server connecting AI agents to ITASCA engines (PFC, FLAC, 3DEC, MPoint, MassFlow) — run numerical simulations through natural conversation
An agent small enough to run anywhere. A minimal agentic runtime in C — ~380 lines, 54KB binary, ~2MB RAM. A skill file + an LLM + a shell loop, no framework.
Personal Context Manager for Claude Code. Your life in walnuts.
Autonomous agent framework with structured memory, safety hooks, and loop management. Built by the agent that runs on it.
Secure autonomous AI agent framework and platform. Build AI teams by describing what you want. Orchestrate agents that can do everything a human can do.
